body:
## Summary
- add `--focus-xp-rules` to `scripts/validate-content.js`
- expand XP validation to 24 answer/completion/level cases, including malformed runtime inputs
- route XP parity tests through the focused validator and guard that routing

## Verification
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node scripts/validate-content.js --focus-xp-rules`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH NODE_OPTIONS='--v8-pool-size=1' node --test tests/content-xp-rules-parity.test.js tests/content-test-script-routing.test.js scripts/learning.test.js --test-name-pattern "XP|xp|focus-xp|calculateAnswerXp|calculateQuizCompletionXp|calculateLevel|level threshold"`
- `NODE_PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules PATH=/home/billy/Swedish_Civic_Test/node_modules/.bin:$PATH npm run validate:content`
- `npm run typecheck -- --pretty false`
- `git diff --check`
title: tests: add focused XP rules validation gate
